top_findings.summary: The skill allows unrestricted use of kubectl commands (Bash(kubectl:*)), which is not inherently required for the primary purpose of Supabase migration (e.g., data re-architecture, code adaptation, or traffic shifting). While npm and node commands are relevant for JavaScript/TypeScript environments common in Supabase integrations, kubectl is specific to Kubernetes orchestration and may only be necessary in scenarios involving containerized deployments—a detail not justified or restricted in the skill description. This broad permission could enable unnecessary or risky infrastructure actions unrelated to core migration tasks.
